# Inception Emails

> AI-powered cold email outreach for B2B service businesses. We deliver qualified decision-makers to your calendar at $15-40 per lead instead of the $80-300/lead from Google Ads or Meta. 50M+ emails delivered, 11% average reply rate, 340% average client ROI.

We serve service businesses in six verticals with industry-tailored outbound campaigns: managed service providers (MSPs), dental practices, functional medicine clinics, life insurance agents, mortgage brokers, and property maintenance companies.

## What Inception Emails does

- AI-driven cold email outreach (no templates, no mail merge)
- Firmographic + technographic + behavioral prospect targeting
- Personalized outreach written individually per prospect
- Qualified prospects booked directly onto the client's calendar
- Continuous AI optimization of targeting, messaging, and timing

## Pricing

- $15-40 per qualified lead (vs $150-300 Google Ads, $80-200 Meta)
- 340% average client ROI
- Custom monthly volume tiers — see /pricing

## Industries we serve

- [Managed Service Providers (MSPs)](https://inception-emails.com/msp): https://inception-emails.com/msp
- [Dental Practices](https://inception-emails.com/dental): https://inception-emails.com/dental
- [Functional Medicine Clinics](https://inception-emails.com/functional-medicine): https://inception-emails.com/functional-medicine
- [Life Insurance Agents](https://inception-emails.com/life-insurance): https://inception-emails.com/life-insurance
- [Mortgage Brokers](https://inception-emails.com/mortgage): https://inception-emails.com/mortgage
- [Property Maintenance Companies](https://inception-emails.com/property-maintenance): https://inception-emails.com/property-maintenance
